Package i5.cb.telos.object

Class Attribute

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.telos.object.TelosObject
      • i5.cb.telos.object.TelosLink
        • i5.cb.telos.object.Attribute
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable

    public final class Attribute
extends TelosLink
implements java.io.Serializable
    Telos attribute, that is an instance of the Attribute system class. Note that in Telos, an Attribute instance is a link rather than an individual (or node) object.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
